L. 104–66section 1113 of Title 31

children.label: A
children.text: a current inventory of such activities organized by statutory authorization and budget outlay;

children.label: B
children.text: a current inventory of such activities organized by field of basic and applied science; and

children.label: C
children.text: a current inventory of such activities organized by commodity and product category;
any recommendations of the Advisory Board; and

in the second and succeeding years, a five-year projection of national priorities with respect to agricultural research, extension, and teaching, taking into account both domestic and international needs.
